content:
📜 1. XP Redemption System – Practical Uses Without Cheating Learning

📜 XP can now be used to modify assignment parameters, but not to “skip” work entirely.

✔ Students may spend XP to:
• Gain extra time on an assessment (but with a diminishing return—max extension is 24 hours).
• Earn a revision pass for one major assignment.
• Unlock a textbook or note reference for one section of the Mastery Exam.
• Transform a critical essay into a creative writing piece (but must still engage with the text).
• Skip one in-class challenge (but must replace it with an alternative critical response).

📜 Rules for XP Spending
✔ A max of 2 redemptions per student per semester.
✔ Students may only spend XP before an assignment due date.
✔ XP cannot be spent to change final grades—only to adjust how work is completed.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 261 (chunk 261/555)
